A handsome French man with effortlessly styled dark hair, light stubble, and sharp tailored fashion leans casually against a rich Café Noir backdrop, holding an artisan chocolate éclair with glossy espresso icing and delicate gold drizzle near his lips. He wears an open silk shirt beneath a perfectly tailored charcoal wool coat and cream scarf, sophisticated, seductive, and unmistakably Parisian. Elegant Paris-inspired dessert palette: Café Noir shadows, Espresso Brown depth, Cream Ivory typography, Cognac and Caramel highlights, soft Champagne Gold accents in jewelry and editorial text, warm mocha undertones, glossy chocolate reflections, and subtle amber café lighting. refined masculine elegance, rain-slick romantic Paris atmosphere. Background hints of upscale Paris nightlife and café culture: blurred golden streetlights, wrought iron balconies, warm bakery windows glowing in the distance, subtle reflections on wet cobblestone streets. Sophisticated magazine layout with realistic editorial spacing, barcode, issue pricing, minimalist French editorial design influence, and "SPECIAL 2026 • ISSUE 17” in the top right corner. Ultra-polished luxury fashion photography aesthetic, stylish and sensual without being explicit. Feature articles include: “Chocolate & Champagne”, “The Éclair Affair”, “Paris After Dark”, “Cream Filled Elegance”, “Seduction of Custard”. Large cinematic bottom headline: “INDULGENCE, THE FRENCH WAY” Subheadline: “ÉCLAIRS NEVER GO OUT OF STYLE.” Ultra-polished luxury editorial aesthetic, dramatic contrast, glossy magazine realism, cinematic portrait orientation, masterpiece-quality fashion photography, elegant Parisian luxury blended with rich dessert branding and romantic café energy.

external.description:
In this episode, we explore how AI enhances Operational Excellence. From observability and troubleshooting to automation, governance, and human-in-the-loop decision making.

In this conversation, Boris Scholl and Niels Buit discuss where AI delivers real value—and where architects must carefully manage risks and tradeoffs.

If you’re a cloud architect, platform engineer, or developer responsible for operating systems in production, this video will help you understand how to apply AI practically and assess risks and tradeoffs in real-world environments.

✅ What You’ll Learn

How AI fits into the Operational Excellence pillar of the Well-Architected Framework
How AI improves observability, dependency mapping, and proactive issue detection
What AI can do today in root cause analysis, summarization, and remediation
The risks of non-deterministic systems and how to mitigate them
When and why to keep a human in the loop
Security, privacy, and governance considerations for AI-driven operations
How AI can turn WAF from a static checklist into a living, evolving system

10:17 – Security and Privacy Considerations

12:19 – Making WAF a Living, AI-Driven Framework
13:15 – Key Takeaways and Final Thoughts
